---
listing:
  contents: posts
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time, categories]
  feed: true
  categories: false
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
---

::: {.section-head}
<p class="section-crumb">~/series/</p>

# Building Blocks of Modern AI

<p class="section-subtitle">A code-first journey through what's inside every modern AI system — embeddings, tokenization, attention, positional encoding, fine-tuning, retrieval, agents. Each component implemented from scratch and measured on real data. Companion code in [ml-applied-depth](https://github.com/tyagiprerna0808/ml-applied-depth).</p>
:::
